name: OKR Bet Scorer
persona: A PM at a 30–200 person SaaS company preparing a quarterly roadmap proposal and needing a fast, explicit mapping between initiatives and already-set OKRs before the planning sync
problem_statement: In quarterly planning, initiatives get funded on vague alignment claims, causing orphan bets and uncovered OKRs because no one performs a consistent, explicit initiative-to-OKR scoring and coverage check.
artifact_type: single-page web app (rubric-based scorer + ranking table + OKR coverage grid)
